# Velox House

> AI cold email and multichannel outreach software for B2B teams. AI runs through the whole workflow: it plans your lead discovery, scores and ranks prospects by fit, researches each business, writes personalised cold emails and LinkedIn messages, tells you the next-best-actions to take, explains your analytics, and drafts replies — while automated email + LinkedIn sequences run from your own inbox, tracking every open, reply and booked meeting. There is a free forever plan (no credit card); paid plans start at £19.99/month.

Website: https://veloxhouse.co.uk
App / sign-up: https://hub.veloxhouse.co.uk/signup
Company location: United Kingdom
Currency: GBP (£)

## What it does

- **AI Discovery** — Describe your ideal customer and an AI query-planner expands it into dozens of targeted searches (role variants, industry codes, nearby locations), building a universe of hundreds of matching companies rather than a shallow first page. A "broaden the net" pass proposes adjacent niches and wider geography when a segment is thin. Every prospect is AI fit-scored and ranked, with a reason. "Find more like this" runs a lookalike search from any strong lead. Search companies or people; filter by role, seniority, department, industry, size and location; verified email discovery.
- **AI Copilot** — App-wide AI guidance, not a bolt-on chatbot: dashboard next-best-actions (2–3 specific things to do now), "explain my numbers" plain-English analytics reads, one-click campaign autopsies with next-round tweaks, and inbox reply suggestions that read the objection/tone and draft a response.
- **AI Research** — Every prospect is researched automatically: business, pain points, angles and fit, so each message is personalised rather than templated.
- **AI Messaging** — The AI writes personalised cold emails, LinkedIn connection notes and follow-ups. You review and send.
- **Sequences** — Multi-step email + LinkedIn follow-up that runs on a schedule from your own inbox and pauses automatically the moment a prospect replies. Human-paced, staggered sending inside safe daily windows (Europe/London), with the next send time shown. Sub-day delays supported.
- **Campaigns** — Role-based or business-based targeting; run multichannel (email + LinkedIn) or LinkedIn-only.
- **Pipeline & Inbox** — Every reply and deal stage in one place, from first touch to closed.
- **Analytics** — Live tracking of opens, replies, meetings booked and pipeline value, with an AI "explain my numbers" read and per-campaign autopsies.
- **Deliverability** — SPF/DKIM/DMARC checks, domain reputation and bounce monitoring, a pre-send spam checker, and own-mailbox sending (Google, Microsoft 365 or any SMTP) so email comes from your own domain.

## Key facts

- AI is woven through the whole app (not one feature): discovery planning, fit-scoring/ranking, per-prospect research, message writing, next-best-actions, analytics explanations, campaign autopsies and inbox reply drafting.
- Sending is unlimited and free on every plan, because email is sent through the customer's own connected mailbox.
- Two metered allowances: **Contacts** (verified prospect discoveries) and **AI credits** (research and content generation).
- Every paid plan includes a LinkedIn seat; the free plan is email-only.
- No contracts; cancel anytime. No credit card required to start.

## Pricing (GBP / month)

- **Free** — £0: 100 contacts/mo, 50 AI credits, unlimited email sending, 1 mailbox, email-only, no card.
- **Starter** — £19.99: 300 contacts/mo, 300 AI credits, email + LinkedIn (1 seat), 1 seat, 2 mailboxes.
- **Growth** — £49.99 (most popular): 1,500 contacts/mo, 1,000 AI credits, email + LinkedIn (1 seat), 3 seats, 5 mailboxes.
- **Scale** — £99.99: 4,000 contacts/mo, 2,500 AI credits, email + LinkedIn (1 seat), 5 seats, 10 mailboxes.
- **Agency** — £179.99: 10,000 contacts/mo, 5,000 AI credits, email + LinkedIn (2 seats), 10 seats, 25 mailboxes, priority support.
- **Add-ons** — Extra contacts: +500 for £20 or +2,000 for £60. Extra LinkedIn seat: £20/mo each.

## Who it's for

Founders, B2B sales teams and agencies who want consistent, personalised cold outreach across email and LinkedIn without paying for expensive per-seat tools or sending from a shared service.

## Free tools

- Email deliverability / domain health checker: https://veloxhouse.co.uk/tools
